scripts.//server: Runs the dashboard + bot server with hot reload — it auto-restarts when a LOCAL source file changes, so edits show up without a manual restart. SAFETY: it watches LOCAL files only — no `git pull`, no network, no new endpoint — so it adds no attack surface. A restart is safe in operation too: the orchestrator's resumeAll() relaunches any running bots from their sticky desiredRunning intent (the same path that survives a redeploy). Dashboard html/css/js are also re-read per request, so UI edits show on a plain browser refresh even between restarts.
